## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Docs clearly mark planned vs implemented behavior.
- [ ] Links are updated.
- [ ] Command examples match `docs/cli.md`.
- [ ] Generated artifact examples match `docs/manifest-contracts.md`.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior is not overclaimed.
- [ ] Out-of-scope notes are included where useful.
